title: FileFerry Configuration
description: Per-project deployment configuration for the FileFerry VSCode extension

defaultServerId.description: UUID of the default server used for Alt+U uploads

uploadOnSave.description: When true, files are automatically uploaded to the default server on save

dryRun.description: When enabled, upload commands show what would be transferred without actually deploying.

fileDateGuard.description: When false, disables the remote mtime check before uploading. Defaults to true when omitted.

backupBeforeOverwrite.description: When true, downloads each existing remote file to .vscode/fileferry-backups/ before uploading the new version.

backupRetentionDays.description: Number of days to keep backup folders before automatic cleanup.

backupMaxSizeMB.description: Maximum total size of the backups folder in megabytes. Oldest backups are pruned first.

historyMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of entries in the upload history file. Defaults to 10000. Set to 0 to disable history logging.

servers.description: Server definitions keyed by display name

credentialId.description: UUID reference to an SSH credential

credentialName.description: Human-readable credential name for documentation and teammate onboarding

rootPath.description: Absolute path on the remote server

mappings.description: Local-to-remote path mappings. More specific paths take priority.

localPath.description: Local path relative to workspace root. Use '/' for the whole project.

excludedPaths.description: Glob patterns for files/folders to never upload (e.g. 'node_modules', '*.log', '.env')

filePermissions.description: Octal permission mode applied to uploaded files (e.g. 420 for 0644). SFTP only; FTP makes a best-effort SITE CHMOD.

directoryPermissions.description: Octal permission mode applied to created directories (e.g. 493 for 0755). SFTP only; FTP makes a best-effort SITE CHMOD.

timeOffsetMs.description: Clock skew offset in milliseconds (remote minus local). Detected automatically via Test Connection.
